description_long: This kindergarten building features a single-story layout with multiple rooms, each distinctly partitioned and furnished for various activities. Large windows line several exterior walls, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The rooms are decorated with colorful elements, including patterned floors and wall accents, creating a vibrant and welcoming environment for children. The structure includes a main entrance, several interior doors, and visible classroom and play areas, but no outdoor playground equipment is attached. The exterior is primarily white with some wooden and brick accents, and the roof is flat, typical of modern educational facilities. The overall design emphasizes openness, safety, and accessibility for young children.
description: A modern, single-story kindergarten with large windows, colorful interiors, and multiple partitioned rooms designed for children's activities. The building features a flat roof and a bright, welcoming exterior.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance, large windows, and a glimpse into several classrooms with colorful interiors and visible furniture.
description_view_1: This angle shows the rear and side walls, with more windows and a clear view of the internal room layout, including play and activity areas.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the back entrance, additional windows, and the arrangement of rooms along the building's length.
description_view_3: This view displays the side and rear of the building, with visible interior partitions and a large open area adjacent to the structure.
